title: Legal Status of Expedited Partner Therapy (EPT) | STI | CDC
text:
EPT in Ohio 
EPT is permissible in Ohio. 
Legal Status of EPT in Oklahoma 
EPT is potentially allowable in Oklahoma.

EPT is permissible in Oregon.
